hooks.command: jq -r 'select((.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // "") | test("/ui/")) | .session_id' | { read -r sid && [ -n "$sid" ] && touch "/tmp/claude-ui-touched-$sid"; } 2>/dev/null || true

sid=$(jq -r '.session_id // empty'); f="/tmp/claude-ui-touched-$sid"; if [ -f "$f" ]; then rm -f "$f"; echo "→ ui/ was edited this session; running ui unit tests..."; make -C /Users/imarios/Projects/open-analysi/analysi-app/ui test-unit; fi
